auditor_notes: Wild-type tet(A) and oqxAB do not give tigecycline R. Suggests unannotated chromosomal regulator LoF (ramR/acrR/oqxR). HypothesisGen flavor.

required_genes_proposed: Wild-type tet(A) alone with tigecycline Intermediate phenotype is borderline; not clearly any single mechanism.
